calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2003 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Dpu Scd 218 At 9:00 Am. On June 12, 2003.
Off Calendar Jun-17-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S, Ravinantapricha, CSR: Valerie Papale.
Appearances:
Fred Keeperman, Esq. for Plaintiff The National Collection Agency, Inc. present by CFO., Craig Garman, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the Defendant Raymond Clark as follows:
Damages of $4,669.50
Attorney's fees of $800.00
Costs of $169.00
Interest of $1,281.43. For the total of $6,919.93
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2003 Continued To Aug-29-03 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
